# Rent4Ring

> Premium Nürburgring Nordschleife rental cars since 2009. Track-prepared vehicles for Touristenfahrten, track days, and the Industry Pool.

## About

Rent4Ring GmbH und Co. KG is the leading car rental company at the Nürburgring Nordschleife in Nürburg, Germany. Founded in 2009, we offer a fleet of 20+ track-prepared vehicles ranging from the MINI Cooper S (from €179/lap) to the Ferrari 296 GTB (from €699/lap). Every car is upgraded in-house with motorsport-grade parts: Öhlins suspension, Endless racing brakes, Michelin/Yokohama tires, Wiechers roll cages, and Recaro seats.

## Fleet

- MINI Cooper S - 192 HP, from €179/lap
- Toyota GR Yaris - 280 HP, AWD, from €219/lap
- Toyota GR Supra - 258 HP, from €249/lap
- Porsche Taycan Turbo GT - 1,034 HP, from €299/lap
- Porsche 718 Spyder RS - 500 HP, from €399/lap
- Porsche 911 GT3 RS (992) - 525 HP, from €699/lap
- Ferrari 296 GTB - 830 HP, from €699/lap

## Location

Burgstraße 1, 53520 Nürburg, Germany
